## Validation

- [ ] Relevant checks passed locally or in CI, or not run because this is a documentation/process-only change

## Visual Changes

- [ ] Visual changes included; screenshots or screen recordings are attached in this PR (leave unchecked if no visual changes)

When the PR changes app UI, layout, styling, icons, screenshots, or user-visible states, include at least one screenshot in this PR. Prefer Playwright screenshot artifacts when available.
